zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh Ewing Crawford於1526年2月10日出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾比爾尼時，他的父親Lawrence Crawford of Kilbirny22歲，母親Helen Campbell13歲。他於1570年與Janet Kerr結婚。他於1568年登記服兵役。他在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾比爾尼被列為laird of kilbirnie。他埋葬在英國蘇格蘭諾斯 艾斯爾吉爾比爾尼。

nameMeanings.name: Crawford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: habitational name from any of various places called Crawford, primarily the one in Lanarkshire (Scotland), and possibly also from the one in Lancashire. Both are named in Old English with crāwe ‘crow’ + ford ‘ford’.

variants.name: Crafford
meanings: English (Cumberland) and Scottish: variant of   Crawford  .

variants.name: Crofoot
meanings: English: variant ofCrowfoot, a nickname for someone with splayed feet or someother deformity of the foot, from Old English crāwe ‘crow’ +fōt ‘foot’. In Middle English crou-fot also denotedthe buttercup, and it may be from this sense that the name arose,although the reason for its adoption is unclear.

variants.name: Crofut
meanings: Scottish and English: variant of Crawford or Crowfoot (see Crofoot ).

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

nameMeanings.name: Ewing
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: altered form of Ewen , formed as if it were an English patronymic ending in -ing. See also McEwen .

variants.name: Ewen
meanings: The usual Anglicized form in Scotland and Northern Ireland of Gaelic Eóghan . It is also found in northern England from the 14th century onwards, and since the late 1990s has been one of the Gaelic names that enjoy wider currency.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh Ewing Crawford was born on 10 February 1526, in Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Scotland, his father, Lawrence Crawford of Kilbirny, was 22 and his mother, Helen Campbell, was 13. He married Janet Kerr in 1570. He registered for military service in 1568. His occupation is listed as laird of kilbirnie in Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. He was buried in Kilbirnie, North Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh Ewing Crawford est né le 10 février 1526, à Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Lawrence Crawford of Kilbirny, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Helen Campbell, avait 13 ans. Il a épousé Janet Kerr en 1570. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1568. Sa profession de son indiquée est laird of kilbirnie à Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ilenterré à Kilbirnie, North Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh Ewing Crawford am 10. Februar 1526 in Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lawrence Crawford of Kilbirny 22 und seine Mutter Helen Campbell 13. Er hat 1570 Janet Kerr geheiratet. Er hat sich 1568 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. sein Beruf ist als laird of kilbirnie in Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er wurde in Kilbirnie, North Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Ewing Crawford è nato il il 10 febbraio 1526 nel Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Lawrence Crawford of Kilbirny, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Helen Campbell, aveva 13 anni. Lui sposato Janet Kerr nel 1570. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1568. La sua occupazione è indicata come laird of kilbirnie nel Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. ja.lifeSummary: Hugh Ewing Crawfordが1526年2月10日にスコットランドエイルシュアイアキルバーニーで生まれた時，父Lawrence Crawford of Kilbirnyは22歳，母Helen Campbellは13歳であった。1570年にJanet Kerrと結婚した。彼は1568年に兵役登録をした。イギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアキルバーニーでの職業はlaird of kilbirnieと記録されている。彼はイギリススコットランドノース エイルシュアイアキルバーニーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh Ewing Crawford(이)가 1526년 2월 10일 스컷랜드 에이르실르 킬비른이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lawrence Crawford of Kilbirny(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Helen Campbell(은)는 13세였다. 그는 1570년 Janet Kerr(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1568년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그의 직업은 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 킬비른이에서 laird of kilbirnie이었다. 그는 영국 스코틀랜드 노르스 에이르실르 킬비른이에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Janet Kerr em 1570. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1568. Sua profissão aparece como laird of kilbirnie em Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh Ewing Crawford родился 10 февраля 1526 г. в местности килбирни, аиршир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Lawrence Crawford of Kilbirny было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Helen Campbell, 13. Он женился на женщине по имени Janet Kerr в 1570 г. В 1568 году он поступил на военную службу. Работал по профессии laird of kilbirnie в местности килбирни, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания. Он был похоронен в местности килбирни, норт аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания.
